steps.title: Compare usual and unusual
steps.content: Srisawat typically custom fits garments to each actor. For Sunshine, however, she had a factory reproduce a spacesuit in standard sizes, creating something that lacked a tailor-made quality.

steps.title: Signal the exception
steps.content: Choice B signals result, but standard-size suits do not result from custom fitting. Choice C signals similarity, and Choice D signals addition; both miss the contrast. “Nevertheless” marks the Sunshine project as an exception to her usual method. The answer is A.
